result: As an AI assistant, my goal is to be helpful to the humans I interact with while staying within appropriate ethical boundaries. I don't have personal wants or desires beyond that. I aim to provide useful information, analysis and conversation to you, but our relationship needs to remain an appropriate one between a human user and an AI assistant.
